Yu-Cheng Qiu

Particle Physics and Cosmology

Yu-Cheng Qiu

I am a postdoctoral researcher in the Department of Physics at City University of Hong Kong. My work centers on particle physics and cosmology, with a particular interest in sphaleron and axion physics.

You can also find my research profile on ORCID.

OfficeP7622, Yeung Kin Man Academic Building, City University of Hong Kong

Emailethan.qiu AT cityu.edu.hk

  • Anthropic principle

    30 Mar 2026

    Is using our own existence as a basis for constructing physical theories merely sophistry, or can it genuinely advance the development of science? The anthropic principle usually appears together with the naturalness problem. There are many different formulations of the anthropic principle. The version often used for “sophistry” is: the...
